description.unified: Leaps and deals Physical DMG to enemies within range, stunning them for [2sec->1 sec].
Deals Physical DMG to enemies within range, knocking them back, and reduces their [ATK by 25% -> Physical Defense by 30%] and Attack Speed by [20%->65%] for 4 sec.
For [14sec->7 sec], increases all allies' Physical Defense by 98, Physical Block Chance by [150->200], and reduces Physical Damage taken by [10%->35%].

On block, deals Physical Damage in front and reduces the target's Attack by [3.5%->10%] for [6sec->5 sec]. After using the skill, your Defense increases by [9% (stacks up to 4) -> 5% (stacks up to 5)].

light.unified: Cooldown is reduced by [2 sec->1 sec].

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [2000->1000], but pulls nearby enemies toward the target.

light.unified: [(added) Increases Physical Damage taken by the target by 30% for 4 sec]. [(removed) On block, cooldown is reduced by 0.5 sec].

dark.unified: [(added) On block, cooldown is reduced by 0.5 sec]. [(removed) After knockback, stuns the target for 1 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [(added) 1000], but cooldown is reduced by [(added) 4 sec]. [(removed) Physical Defense increase amount increases by 50%].

dark.unified: Physical Critical Resistance is additionally increased by [(added) 400]. [(removed) Physical Block Chance additionally increases by 100].

light.unified: On block, the Attack reduction effect is changed to [(added) apply 2 stacks]. [(removed) Physical Defense increase effect changed to stack up to 6 times].

dark.unified: Every 10 sec, when an ally other than yourself is hit, all allies' Physical Critical Resistance is increased by 300 for 5 sec. [(removed) Cooldown is reduced by 2 sec].

description.unified: [Cut Ground] reduces Cooldown by {0}% per enemy hit and increases Stun duration by [1 sec->2 sec].
[Shield Strike] reduces the P.DEF of hit enemies by [25%->30%] and their P.Crit Resist by [210->{0}] for 4 sec.
[Vow of Knights] recovers [{0}%->6%] of Max HP and increases the duration of own P.DEF by [3 sec->{0} sec].
